title: aster luteus
intro: Aster luteus, also known as the yellow daisy or yellow starflower, is a flowering plant belonging to the daisy family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits like reducing inflammation and boosting the immune system. Aster luteus can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
